playbook.intent: Empty editor at 9am → one feature slice merged to staging by EOD.
playbook.scope: Solo founder ships one feature slice to staging in a single focused day: spec written, code generated against acceptance criteria, self-review pass complete, PR merged, deploy verified. Exit artifact is staging URL with feature live.

success-criteria.criterion: 1-page spec written with explicit acceptance criteria
Tests written or generated against acceptance criteria
PR merged to staging with feature flag
Staging smoke pass within 1h of merge

stage.name: Spec
stage.intent: Write what 'done' looks like before any code is generated.
stage.decision-gate: Advance when acceptance criteria are atomic + checkable. Refuse to code with fuzzy spec.

stage.name: Generate
stage.intent: AI implements against the spec; founder steers, not types.

tasks.task: Pass spec + repo context to AI

stage.decision-gate: Advance when tests pass locally. Stay if tests fail or diff > 500 lines.

stage.name: Review
stage.decision-gate: Advance when checklist passes. If 3+ items fail, return to Generate.

stage.name: Ship
stage.intent: Merge with flag, deploy, verify on staging.
stage.decision-gate: Required output: feature works on staging URL. If smoke fails, hot-rollback flag.

extra.value: ['Multi-day epics — split first, then ship daily', Major refactors — keep day's PR < 500 lines]
[Spec or rough requirement available at start of day, CI pipeline configured (cd-basics complete)]
[Generating code before the spec is acceptance-criteria-clean — produces 90% of the wrong thing, Skipping self-review because 'tests pass' — tests don't catch design drift]
['Is the spec the agent generated tests against the same spec a human would test against?', 'Did I read every line of generated code, or did I just trust the diff?']

{human: faion get-content daily-sdd-spec-code-review --format md, agent: faion get-content daily-sdd-spec-code-review --format context, json: faion get-content daily-sdd-spec-code-review --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P1 solo SaaS builder persona}]
